---
title: "env_overlap_across_gear"
author: "charley"
date: "27/01/2022"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(hrbrthemes)
library(viridis)

user = "charley"

if (user == "charley") {
  wrkg_dir <- "C:/Users/cgros/code/IMAS/ARC_Data/annotation"
}

setwd(wrkg_dir)
```

## Data loading

```{r load}
load("Circumpolar_Annotation_Env_Data.RData")

env_layer_names <- c("depth",
                     "slope",
                     "tpi",
                     "NPP_su_mean",
                     "seafloorcurrents",
                     "seafloortemperature",
                     "sst_su_mean",
                     "sst_su_sd",
                     "ice_su_mean",
                     "ice_su_sd",
                     "no3_mean",
                     "no3_sd",
                     "o2_mean",
                     "o2_sd",
                     "distance2canyons")
```

## Look at distribution

```{r curation}
# Remove cells with no gear info available
data = cell_metadata_env[!is.na(cell_metadata_env$gear), ]
# Get sample size
sample_size = data %>% group_by(gear) %>% summarise(num=n())
```
```{r violinplot, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
for (env_name in env_layer_names) {
  print(data %>%
          left_join(sample_size) %>%
          mutate(myaxis = paste0(gear, "\n", "n=", num)) %>%
          ggplot( aes(x=myaxis, y=eval(as.name(env_name)), fill=gear)) +
          geom_violin(width=1.4) +
          geom_boxplot(width=0.1, color="grey", alpha=0.2) +
          scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE) +
          theme_ipsum() +
          theme(
            legend.position="none",
            plot.title = element_text(size=11)
          ) +
          ggtitle(env_name) +
          xlab(""))
}
```
